curation_notes: Patch commit d64c6b2 modifies only one non-test source file (src/flask_uploads/flask_uploads.py). The fix adds secure_filename() sanitization to the name parameter in the save() method, re-validates extensions after name override, sanitizes folder components, and adds realpath containment checks. Pre-assigned class path-traversal is correct: the root vulnerability is unsanitized path input enabling directory escape. CWE-1336 (SSTI) describes the exploitation impact, not the root cause fixed by the patch.
